import io
import string

let line1 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let line2 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let a = string.split_whitespace(line1)
let b = string.split_whitespace(line2)

let n = a.len()
mut i = 0
while i < n
  let sa = match a.get(i)
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let sb = match b.get(i)
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let ia = match string.parse_int(sa)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  let ib = match string.parse_int(sb)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  let s = ia + ib
  println("#{ia}+#{ib}=#{s}")
  i = i + 1
end
